title: Can Crusher-Culley Protocol

guidelines: {"blocks":[{"key":"4d011","text":"Supplies needed (per 100 mL sample):    ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":40}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"e6va4","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"d30lu","text":"Sample (0.2 µm filtered seawater)One 60 mL syringe","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"92njo","text":" One Anotop (0.02 µm filter)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"28r85","text":" One piece of parafilm","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"f0s2s","text":" One piece of aluminum foilOne Ziploc freezer bag","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"8ltbc","text":" Sharpie (ultra-fine)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"f2l0a","text":" Can crusher","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
